name: Microsoft 365
description: Monitor Microsoft 365 user access, conditional access policies, and audit log activity for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Register an app in Azure AD > App registrations
2. Add Delegated permissions: User.Read.All, AuditLog.Read.All, Policy.Read.All, Directory.Read.All
3. Grant admin consent for all permissions
4. Add redirect URI: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
5. Connect using a Work/School account with Global Administrator or Security Administrator role — personal Microsoft accounts (@hotmail/@outlook) are not supported

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews active Microsoft 365 users and verifies account status

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies that conditional access policies exist to enforce environment and access separation

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Verifies that Microsoft 365 directory audit logs are active and contain recent events
